Substitution elasticity & Actor-issue-month or quarter & Event-study or difference-in-differences around a binding reform shock. & Pre-trends, placebo dates, unaffected issues, and alternate matching windows. \\

Comment authenticity and uptake & Docket-comment or docket-rule stage & Treated/untreated or before/after docket comparison around authentication or deduplication. & No-mass-comment placebo dockets, response-section placebos, and duplicate-threshold sensitivity. \\
Venue-shifting detection & Actor-issue-venue-time record & Compare single-source diagnostics with linked multi-venue actor/issue panels. & Manual false-match audits, unrelated issue placebos, and strict/fuzzy matching sensitivity. \\
